preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM role WHERE name = 'ADMIN'

column.name: description
column.value: Super Administrator - Full access to all sources, domains, entities, and fields

changeSet.author: oneapi

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM role WHERE name = 'ADMIN'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO permission (role_id, source_id, domain_id, entity_id, field_id, permission_type, created_by) SELECT id, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, 'READ', 'system' FROM role WHERE name = 'ADMIN' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM permission p WHERE p.role_id = role.id AND p.source_id IS NULL AND p.domain_id IS NULL AND p.entity_id IS NULL AND p.field_id IS NULL )

changeSet.author: oneapi

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM role WHERE name = 'ADMIN'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO user_role (user_id, role_id, assigned_by) SELECT u.id, r.id, 'system' FROM app_user u CROSS JOIN role r WHERE r.name = 'ADMIN' AND u.login IN ('admin') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_role ur WHERE ur.user_id = u.id AND ur.role_id = r.id )

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM role WHERE name IN ('HR_ANALYST', 'SALES_MANAGER')

column.name: description
column.value: HR Analyst - Access to HR data without sensitive salary information

column.name: description
column.value: Sales Manager - Access to sales data only

column.name: description
column.value: Read-only user - Access to specific sources as assigned
